response.justification: Candidate has well over the required 6+ years of full-stack experience with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB work at Optilyz and RIDE, plus current AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq that aligns tightly with the role's AI agent requirement. Background spans backend, frontend, cloud (AWS CDK), and DevOps, with a strong testing/TDD orientation. Gaps in explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin exposure are real but easily bridgeable given the breadth and depth demonstrated.
strengths: Direct TypeScript/Node.js/React/AWS/MongoDB production experience at Optilyz and RIDE
Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, matching a key required skill
Strong testing culture (TDD, trunk-based dev, workshops on testing and Selenium)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the primary stack
Vitest not mentioned (testing experience is present but framework-specific fit unclear)
Kotlin/Java exposure is dated; Java appears only in older robotics/mobile contexts
